[EndSkill] 使除<color=#ffffff>自身</color>以外現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>比例最低的2名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>恢復<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限15%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

[EndSkillHead] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱或<color=#7C5738>撃殺</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則使恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>獲得<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>

levelList.name: 血欲
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有2級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+6)
[StartBattle] <color=#7C5738>本回合</color>使本技能主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]層数不会減少。
[EndSkill] 3回合内，<color=#7C5738>回合結束</color>時使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去10点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>。

coindescs.desc:
[OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成相当于其[Laceration]強度点<color=#FE6E00>色欲</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
- 若<color=#FE6E00>色欲</color><color=#7C5738>共鳴</color>数不低于4，則改為造成相当于(<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度×1.2)点<color=#FE6E00>色欲</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
(本技能最多計入99級[Laceration]強度)
coindescs.summary: [OnSucceedAttack] 根据<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度，相應対其造成<color=#FE6E00>色欲</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>

coindescs.desc:
[EnemyKill] 若本技能或其<color=#ffffff>硬幣效果</color>対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成超過其剩余<color=#61DA61>体力</color>的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>，則対<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>造成共計相当于溢出<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的固定<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
(若是<color=#ffffff>集中遭遇戦</color>，則以本体<color=#61DA61>体力</color>計算)
coindescs.summary: [EnemyKill] 対<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>造成共計相当于溢出<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>。
